_description: Another viewer hit the cache miss first. This request is served the result of an in-flight probe. videoUID and hlsUrl are populated (same as the probe result), but source is 'coalesced'. The timestamp should reflect when the data was originally written, NOT the current time.
_server_must: source MUST be 'coalesced'. All other fields match the probe result (state, videoUID, hlsUrl, errorCode, ts). ETag matches the probe result's ETag (same data). Correlation-ID is DIFFERENT (per-request value).
